title: 70mai A500S Dual Channel: Advanced Dash Cam for Kenyan Roads
excerpt: Looking for reliable dash cam coverage in Kenya? The 70mai Dash Cam Pro Plus+ A500S offers 1944P resolution, ADAS, and built-in GPS, making it ideal for capturing important moments on Nairobi's busy streets and beyond. Get yours at Trivo Kenya.
content:
Introduction

Driving in Kenya, whether it's through the bustling city of Nairobi or on a cross-country trip, comes with its share of unpredictable moments. A dash cam isn't just a gadget; it's an important tool for documentation, security, and peace of mind. The 70mai Dash Cam Pro Plus+ A500S Dual Channel steps into this role with a compelling set of features designed to offer comprehensive coverage.

This particular model stands out for its high-resolution recording, integrated GPS, and Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). It’s not simply about recording when an incident occurs; it provides valuable contextual data, from location stamping to lane departure warnings, which can be particularly useful on Kenya's varied road networks. Let's delve into what makes the A500S a strong contender for your vehicle.

Key Specifications

Feature Specification
GPS Built-in
ADAS Supported (Lane Departure, Forward Collision Warning)
Screen 2.0-inch IPS
Image Sensor Sony IMX335
Storage MicroSD up to 128GB (Class 10 recommended)
Resolution (Front) 2592 x 1944 (1944P Ultra HD)
Field of View 140 degrees
Parking Monitoring 24-hour via hardwire kit (sold separately)

Design & Build

The 70mai A500S maintains a relatively compact and discreet form factor, designed to blend into your car's interior without obstructing your view. The device features a 2.0-inch IPS screen on the rear, which is sufficient for reviewing footage and navigating settings directly on the unit. Its build feels solid, ready to withstand the various temperatures and road conditions encountered in Kenya.

Installation is straightforward. It typically mounts to the windshield with an adhesive pad, allowing for a clean setup. The dual-channel aspect means it can accommodate a rear camera (often sold separately, or included in specific bundles) for comprehensive front and back vehicle coverage, a significant advantage for incident recording.

Performance

At the core of the A500S's performance is the Sony IMX335 sensor, enabling 1944P Ultra HD resolution. This ensures that details like license plates, road signs, and facial features are captured with clarity, even when viewing footage on a larger screen. The 140-degree field of view provides a wide perspective of the road ahead, minimizing blind spots in the recording.

Night vision performance is commendable, utilizing 3D DNR (Dynamic Noise Reduction) and WDR (Wide Dynamic Range) technology. This helps to balance exposure in low-light conditions, crucial for discerning details during early morning or late-night drives. The built-in GPS accurately logs your speed and location, embedding this data directly into the video files, which can be invaluable for insurance claims or accident reconstruction. The ADAS features, including lane departure and forward collision warnings, add an extra layer of active safety, providing audible alerts to help prevent potential incidents on Kenyan highways.

The 24-hour parking monitoring feature, when combined with an optional hardwire kit, uses G-sensor detection to automatically record footage if an impact is detected while your vehicle is parked. This provides continuous surveillance against bumps or vandalism, giving you confidence even when you're away from your car.

Where to Buy in Kenya

For those in Kenya looking to enhance their driving safety with the 70mai Dash Cam Pro Plus+ A500S Dual Channel, Trivo Kenya is your go-to source. We stock original 70mai products, ensuring you receive a genuine device with full manufacturer support.

The 70mai A500S is available for KES 14500. We offer convenient payment options including M-Pesa, making your purchase seamless. Delivery is available across Kenya, so whether you're in Nairobi, Mombasa, or Kisumu, you can get this essential gadget delivered right to your doorstep. Visit our website at trivokenya.store or our physical store in Nairobi to experience our range of premium gadgets.

Verdict

The 70mai Dash Cam Pro Plus+ A500S Dual Channel offers a robust combination of high-resolution recording, critical safety features, and reliable performance. Its 1944P resolution and Sony sensor excel at capturing clear footage day and night. The inclusion of built-in GPS and ADAS systems goes beyond basic recording, providing driver assistance and crucial contextual data for any event on the road.

For Kenyan drivers seeking a dependable and feature-rich dash cam that can handle diverse driving conditions and provide peace of mind through comprehensive surveillance, the A500S is a solid investment. It's a vigilant digital witness that adds a significant layer of security to your vehicle. Secure yours today at Trivo Kenya.
